label: Ireland (SEM)

demand: 28 half-hours missing in 12 gap(s) — absent from the TSO submission, shown as gaps, never interpolated. E.g. 03 Jun 17:00→03 Jun 17:30; 04 Jun 09:00→04 Jun 09:30; 04 Jun 12:00→04 Jun 13:30 (+9 more)

solar: reported but CONSTANT ZERO for the entire window. Two possible readings — fleet that genuinely did not run, or a TSO placeholder for capacity it does not meter (SEM's distribution-connected solar is a known placeholder case). The zeros carry no information beyond this note, so the column is excluded from KPI cards, charts and CSV exports; raw values are retained in the data files

price.name: IE day-ahead auction price
price.notes: True auction price — unlike GB's MID proxy. Currency is EUR, not GBP.

generation_by_fuel.name: IE actual generation per production type
generation_by_fuel.notes: Fossil Gas mapped to CCGT (ENTSO-E does not split CCGT/OCGT); Wind On+Offshore summed into WIND — coverage differs from Elexon's transmission-only metering. See plan/04-europe-extension.md.
